author: y4rr
content:
Result: C6.1 SGD-family conformance suite delivered.

Surface inventory: 290 items total across all C6 sub-phases
  C6.1 (SGD-family, this dispatch): 71 items
  C6.2 (Adam-family, deferred): 68 items
  C6.3 (misc/utilities, deferred): 91 items
  C6.4 (schedulers, deferred): 60 items

Fixture script: scripts/regenerate_optim_fixtures.py — exits 0, live torch validation passes (torch 2.6 installed, max_err < 9.1e-6 on all variants). Fixtures: 5 SGD + 3 Adagrad + 2 ASGD + 1 Rprop + 4 RMSprop = 15 fixture variants, 5 steps each.

Conformance tests: 15 tests in ferrotorch-optim/tests/conformance_optim_sgd_family.rs — all pass.
  - SGD: plain, momentum, nesterov, weight_decay, dampening (5 tests)
  - Adagrad: plain, lr_decay, weight_decay (3 tests)
  - ASGD: plain, weight_decay (2 tests)
  - Rprop: plain (1 test)
  - RMSprop: plain, centered, momentum, weight_decay (4 tests)

Clippy: cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-optim --test conformance_optim_sgd_family -- -D warnings exits 0.

Cascade bugs filed: 0 — all 15 tests pass within tolerance (1e-4 abs f32). No divergences.

Layer 4: DEFERRED to C6.4 wrap-up.
